title: hypericum collenetteae
intro: Hypericum collenetteae, also known as Kermes Oak or Spurge Olive, is a species of evergreen shrub in the family Hypericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hypericum collenetteae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
